creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update automake to 1.11.5 (from 1.11.1)
	Offering it up for an -exp run, though I've had this, and
	the previous 1.11.3 in my own tree, compiling stuff successfully
	for quite some time.

Fix: 

http://people.FreeBSD.org/~ade/am114.patch
	SHA256=61160f81557c7023f29b34f5528446099affb5b86bb16e23390070c58d5b9310
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
